items.name: Benjamin Franklin
items.description: "Early to bed and early to rise makes a man healthy, wealthy, and wise." He would know.  This hat was released on 1/17/10 (Mr. Franklin's Birthday)

items.name: United Kingdom Baseball Cap
items.description: Thy choicest gifts in store / On her be pleased to pour, Long may she reign.

items.name: Blox U Grad Cap 2013
items.description: I'm majoring in building!

items.name: Winged Helmet
items.description: Ancient depictions of the god Mercury and of Roma (personification of the city) depict them wearing winged helmets, however in the 19th century the winged helmet became widely used to depict ancient Celtic, Germanic and Viking warriors. It was also used in romantic illustrations of legendary Norse gods and heroes. The motif, along with the Horned helmet, became a clichéd signifier of the "barbarian" Northern warrior.

items.name: Green Martian Space Helmet
items.description: Any helmet can keep you safe on a space mission.  This helmet is for those who like to travel in style.

items.name: Camera Cap
items.description: The secret to being a spy is subtlety. No one will notice this camera.

items.name: American Baseball Cap
items.description: Hip hip hooray! *waves sparklers* Voting Prize for the July 4, 2010 Building Contest

items.name: Snowflake Winter Cap
items.description: The weather outside is frightful...but this cap is so delightful!

items.name: Hanukkah Beanie
items.description: Dreidels to play with and latkes to eat!

items.name: Ancalagon
items.description: Tired of feasting Korblox strays, Ancalagon forsook the northern wastes to wander the world in search of wonders unknown.

items.name: Sharkface Helmet
items.description: If you find a tougher looking helmet... buy it.

items.name: Green Bird Cap
items.description: He was always jealous of the fancy blue bird.  Blue bird thinks he's so great....

items.name: YOLO Trucker Cap
items.description: Young and free, yolo is your motto.

items.name: Violet Star Moto Helmet
items.description: It'll keep you safe.

items.name: YOLO Baseball Cap
items.description: You might think to yourself, "Why this is merely another baseball cap", but you'd be wrong. This is not merely a baseball cap. This is a reminder that you only live once. This is a call to action. Live your best life RIGHT NOW! YOLO! It's not just a fashion statement. It's a statement.

items.name: Hero's Helmet
items.description: He's in your house, savin' your life!

items.name: Warning Helmet
items.description: WARNING!  Next move is inadvisable.  Proceed with caution.

items.name: Cycling Cap
items.description: Aerodynamic cap made from breathable fabric so you can bike somewhere insanely far away from here.

items.name: Parallel Universe Roman Empire Centurion Helmet
items.description: From an alternate reality where the colors of the Roman Empire were gold and maroon. Spectacular!

items.name: Halloween Boo Bow Beanie
items.description: A frighteningly stylish choice.

items.name: Hyperspace Pilot Helmet
items.description: Hyperspace is dangerous- this helmet will protect you.

items.name: Phoenix Winged Knight Helmet
items.description: He is reborn in the flames of the battlefield again and again.

items.name: Halloween Beanie
items.description: The propeller spins when you are thinking deep thoughts or running from zombies.

items.name: Bolt Biter
items.description: He can smell those delicious bolts you have hidden in your car... and he wants to eat them.

items.name: Reindeer Cap
items.description: Santa is in trouble.  Will you help him? In this hat?

items.name: Not An Inmate Cap
items.description: Exactly what it says, exactly what it means.

items.name: Hoverbike Racing Helmet
items.description: It's nice to know that, in the future, some humans still feel the need for speed! ZOoooooooooooooooom...

items.name: Knitted Beanie Dino
items.description: Rawr?

items.name: Astomel's Helmet
items.description: Astomel fought strongly to protect the weak. This pleased the gods and they rewarded him with this winged helmet, so that he might someday see them in their dwellings.
